name: Lehigh County Employees
description_short: Lehigh County Employees Federal Credit Union is a community credit union serving Lehigh County, PA residents with savings accounts, checking (share draft), loans, and home equity products.
description_long:
Lehigh County Employees Federal Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative serving the Lehigh County, Pennsylvania community. The institution is headquartered in Allentown and maintains traditional credit union operations focused on retail banking and lending services. Founded to serve county employees and their families, the credit union has expanded to serve the broader community with comprehensive financial products. The organization's website and service offerings reflect a community-oriented, established financial institution with decades of operational experience.

The credit union offers a range of deposit and lending services designed for personal financial management. Savings products include Regular Share Accounts (minimum $5 opening, $25 minimum to earn dividends), Share Draft checking accounts with no minimum balance or monthly fees, Christmas Club savings vehicles, and Vacation Club accounts. Loan services encompass mortgage and home equity loans advertised at rates as low as 5.00%, personal loans, and various other credit products. Members gain access to home banking platforms for desktop and mobile management, VISA check card debit access, and ATM networks branded with the VISA logo.

The credit union distinguishes itself through member-focused account structures: Share Draft accounts carry no minimum balance, no monthly service charges, and no per-check fees, with the first 50 checks provided free. Dividend earnings on savings accounts are calculated from day of deposit to day of withdrawal and posted quarterly. The institution emphasizes accessibility through online loan calculators and transparent loan approval procedures. Credit life and credit disability insurance options are available at stated "reasonable rates." The credit union provides direct contact with loan officers for personalized guidance on loan products and eligibility.

Lehigh County Employees Federal Credit Union is a straightforward community credit union with conventional banking offerings and no apparent specialization in high-risk lending, credit repair, or alternative financial services. The website provides limited detail on current interest rates (only mortgage/HELOC rates of 5.00% shown), competitive advantages, or membership eligibility beyond county-employee origin. The institution appears stable and locally rooted but does not differentiate itself through digital innovation, competitive rate transparency, or specialized lending programs. For consumers seeking traditional credit union banking with established local presence, this is a viable option; for those seeking rate shopping or advanced digital services, more detailed product comparison would be necessary. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Regular Share Accounts (savings) with minimum $5 opening, $25 dividend threshold
Share Draft checking accounts with no minimum balance, no monthly fees, no per-check charges
Mortgage loans at advertised rates as low as 5.00%
Home Equity Loans (HELOCs) at advertised rates as low as 5.00%
Personal loans and various other credit products
VISA check card (debit card) with ATM access
Credit life insurance and credit disability insurance
Home banking platform (desktop and mobile access)
Online loan calculators for financial planning
Loan officer consultation and personalized loan processing
pros: Share Draft checking accounts with zero minimum balance, no monthly service charges, and no per-check fees
Dividend earnings on savings accounts calculated from day of deposit to day of withdrawal, posted quarterly
First 50 checks provided free with Share Draft account opening
Mortgage and home equity loans advertised at rates as low as 5.00%
No withdrawal penalties on Regular Share Accounts; funds accessible at any time
Credit life and credit disability insurance options available
Online home banking available on desktop and mobile platforms
VISA check card (debit card) access with ATM withdrawal capabilities
cons: Website does not clearly display current rates for savings accounts, personal loans, or auto loans—only mortgage/HELOC rates mentioned
Membership eligibility criteria not specified on website; unclear if open to general public or limited to county employees and families
Limited transparency on loan approval timeline, APR ranges, or specific loan product terms beyond generic descriptions
No mention of online-only features, mobile app functionality, or digital-first services compared to larger national credit unions
Cancelled checks not returned; members must request copies separately, creating administrative friction
best_for: Lehigh County employees and their families seeking traditional credit union membership with local presence
Consumers in the Allentown, PA area looking for no-fee checking with dividend-bearing savings
Mortgage and home equity loan borrowers comparing rates below 5.00% in the Lehigh Valley region
Members prioritizing in-person loan officer relationships and personalized financial guidance
diagnosis: Lehigh County Employees Federal Credit Union is best for local Lehigh County residents seeking traditional, no-frills credit union banking with competitive checking account terms and community-based service. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility and current loan/savings rates are not transparent on the website, requiring direct contact to confirm qualification and compare terms against competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
